title: Qa Enchants
description: Adds a series of interesting enchantments for Minecraft, including some cursed enchantments.
body:
**Armor Enchantments**

**-_Disciplinary Flash_**
  
  Applicable to: Any Armor | Max Level: I
  
  When an entity wears armor with this enchantment, takes damage, and its health drops below 35% of its maximum health, it will restore (8 + Number of Armor Pieces with this Enchantment × 1.5)% of its maximum health.

**-_Anvil Falling_** (Cursed Enchantment)
  
  Applicable to: Boots | Max Level: IV
  
  When an entity wears boots with this enchantment, its safe fall height is significantly reduced, and the damage taken from falling is greatly increased. The higher the enchantment level, the lower the safe fall height and the higher the multiplier of fall damage.

 **-_Aqua Antipathy_** (Cursed Enchantment)
  
  Applicable to: Helmets | Max Level: I
  
  When an entity wears a helmet with this enchantment, its mining efficiency underwater is drastically reduced (nearly slowing down mining speed significantly).
  
 **-_Depth Stayer_** (Cursed Enchantment)
  
  Applicable to: Boots | Max Level: III
  
  When an entity wears boots with this enchantment, its movement speed underwater is noticeably decreased. The higher the enchantment level, the more significant the movement speed reduction.

 **-_Suffocation_** (Cursed Enchantment)
  
  Applicable to: Helmets | Max Level: III
  
  When an entity wears a helmet with this enchantment, its oxygen consumption rate underwater is accelerated. The higher the enchantment level, the faster the oxygen is consumed.

 **-_Enchantment of Absolute Failure_** (Cursed Enchantment)
  
  Applicable to: Any Armor | Max Level: I
  
  When an entity wears armor with this enchantment and takes damage, it will randomly trigger one of the following effects:
  
  1.Greatly increases the movement speed of the entity that dealt damage to it, lasting for 3 seconds;
  
  2.Applies a 3-second immobilization effect to the wearer;
  
  3.Applies a 3-second effect of "melee base attack power reduced by 1024" to the wearer;
  
  4.Applies a 6-second laceration effect to the wearer;
  
  5.Deals an additional damage equal to 50% of the wearer's maximum health to the wearer;
  
  6.Resets the wearer's hunger and saturation to zero, and simultaneously applies a 3-second hunger effect.
  
  If the entity wears multiple pieces of armor with this enchantment, the number of triggered effects will increase; if the same effect is randomly selected multiple times, the duration or intensity of that effect will stack.


**Weapon Enchantments**

 **-_Break Effect_**
  
  Applicable to: Any Weapon | Max Level: V
  
  When dealing damage with a weapon enchanted with this (held in the main hand), it applies a "Toughness Reduction" effect to the target entity. When "Toughness Reduction" stacks to a specified number of times, it triggers a "Weakness Break" effect on the target that lasts for a certain duration.Entities under "Weakness Break" first take an additional "Break Damage", then become unable to move and have their melee attack power reduced by 1024. Targets will not receive new "Toughness Reduction" stacks until the "Weakness Break" effect ends. The higher the enchantment level, the higher the "Break Damage" value and the longer the "Weakness Break" duration.
  
 **-_Radiant Transmutation_** (Cursed Enchantment)
  
  Applicable to: Any Weapon | Max Level: III
  
  When dealing damage with a weapon enchanted with this (held in the main hand), it consumes (Current Health of the Wielder × Enchantment Level × 10%) of the wielder's health, and simultaneously deals additional damage to the target equal to (Lost Health of the Wielder × (2 + Enchantment Level) × 10%).

 **-_Blade of Laceration_**
  
  Applicable to: Any Weapon | Max Level: III
  
  When dealing damage with a weapon enchanted with this (held in the main hand), it has a chance to apply a laceration effect to the target entity that lasts for a certain duration. During the laceration effect, periodic damage is continuously dealt based on the target's maximum health.

 **-_Blade of Weakness_**
  
  Applicable to: Any Weapon | Max Level: III
  
  When dealing damage with a weapon enchanted with this (held in the main hand), it has a chance to apply a weakness effect (reducing the target's attack power) to the target entity that lasts for a certain duration.

 **-_Blade of Immobilize_**
  
  Applicable to: Any Weapon | Max Level: III
  
  When dealing damage with a weapon enchanted with this (held in the main hand), it has a chance to apply an immobilization effect (preventing the target from moving) to the target entity that lasts for a certain duration.

 **-_Blade of Lifesteal_**
  
  Applicable to: Any Weapon | Max Level: III
  
  When dealing damage with a weapon enchanted with this (held in the main hand), it restores health to the wielder in proportion to the actual damage dealt to the target (the higher the damage, the more health restored).
